notes: A breakup song. Moving-on aspiration mixed with unresolved ache. The final stanza IS the song's thesis: four lines each starting with 'Maybe', landing on 'this is just as well' (the title). Each maybe is its own key moment — escalating, quietly. Amber-warm throughout (love song), with the final line mixed (both signals accepting the ambiguity).

chunks.note: Maybe I've finally let go. — maybe #3, biggest aspirational
Or maybe the truth is hard to tell, — the doubt, cooler
And maybe this is just as well. — title landing, both signals accept
